indication: Second line or subsequent treatment of platinum sensitive or partially platinum-sensitive relapsed ovarian cancer in patients previously treated with a taxane/platinum regimen; WHO performance status 0, 1, 2; Palliative intent

chemotherapy_drugs.special_instructions: Pegylated liposomal doxorubicin formulation (Caelyx brand - brands may not be interchangeable). Dilute doses <90mg in 250ml glucose 5%; doses >=90mg in 500ml glucose 5%. First infusion: maximum rate 1mg/minute. If well tolerated, subsequent infusions may be given over 60 minutes. Default infusion time in ARIA is 120 minutes. INCOMPATIBLE WITH SODIUM CHLORIDE 0.9% - always use glucose 5% flush. Do NOT use in-line filters. Exfoliant - extravasation risk. Dose banded per national dose bands (2mg/ml). Maximum lifetime cumulative doxorubicin dose 450mg/m2 (400mg/m2 if prior mediastinal/pericardial radiotherapy). Monitor for infusion reactions.

AUC 4 may be considered instead of AUC 5 if using EDTA clearance; seek consultant advice
If a third dose reduction is required treatment should be stopped
All dose reductions should not be re-escalated without consultant approval

drugs.special_instructions: Dose based on Calvert formula using calculated GFR. Max dose 750mg (set at 790mg in ARIA for national dose band compliance). AUC 4 may be considered with EDTA clearance. Dose may need adjustment if GFR changes >10% from previous cycle. Carboplatin is an irritant. Dose banded per national dose bands (10mg/ml).
drugs.notes: once per cycle | Dose based on Calvert formula using calculated GFR. Max dose 750mg (set at 790mg in ARIA for national dose band compliance). AUC 4 may be considered with EDTA clearance. Dose may need adjustment if GFR changes >10% from previous cycle. Carboplatin is an irritant. Dose banded per national dose bands (10mg/ml).
